summary: Iteration 106: P0 Verification Complete - 12/12 backend tests passed. Frontend pages load correctly. VAPID key fix verified. Admin push notification logic confirmed. REGRESSION ISSUE CONFIRMED: Reset Tracker still allows resetting admin accounts - NO protection exists.

critical.issue: REGRESSION: Reset tracker endpoint allows resetting admin accounts. When master admin calls this endpoint, their own data is deleted without any protection. This is the recurring 'Reset Tracker Incorrectly Resets Admin Account' issue.
critical.recommendation: Add check in reset_profit_tracker() to prevent admin roles from resetting themselves or add confirmation step

ui_bugs.issue: Broken image placeholder showing 'Proof' text with alt text visible

action_items: CRITICAL: Add admin account protection to DELETE /api/profit/reset endpoint - prevent admin roles from being reset accidentally
LOW: Fix broken image in Activity Feed 'Proof' item
critical_code_review_comments: ⚠️ REGRESSION CONFIRMED: reset_profit_tracker() at line 1654 in server.py has NO check to prevent admin accounts from being reset
The endpoint only checks if Master Admin is resetting OTHER users, but doesn't prevent admin from resetting themselves
Recommendation: Add role check like 'if user.get("role") in ["master_admin", "super_admin", "basic_admin"]: raise HTTPException(403, "Admin accounts cannot be reset")'
✅ VAPID key fix verified: frontend/.env line 4 has REACT_APP_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY on separate line
✅ service-worker.js has push event handler (line 44) with showNotification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reset tracker regression issue still exists. The fix needs to be applied to server.py line 1654-1692 (reset_profit_tracker function). All other features working: VAPID key, push notifications, activity feed, all pages load. Test file: test_iteration_106_p0_verification.py

verified_features.details: GET /api/users/vapid-public-key returns valid key starting with 'B'
Line 4: REACT_APP_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY is on separate line
Has push event listener at line 44 with showNotification
Completes habit and triggers admin push logic
Login form works, redirects to dashboard
Shows Activity Feed with data-testid, live activity
Shows habits, streaks, signal unlocked status
Shows active signal, LOT size, Merin Trading iframe
Shows tabs for conversation starters, templates, materials, FAQs
Shows all tabs including Master Admin section

regression_check.issue: Reset Tracker Incorrectly Resets Admin Account
regression_check.evidence: DELETE /api/profit/reset returns 200 and resets admin data without any protection
